name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Luce series mini zip wallet. The Gucci Luce collection exudes a playful and fun vibe, with "Luce" meaning "Light" in Italian. Original GG canvas infuses this petite mini zip wallet with design essence. Blue leather trim and light gold-tone hardware complement the beige and blue pattern. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, blue leather trim, light gold-tone metal hardware, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo zip pull.

Model: 790037.
Size: 13(W) x 9(H) x 3cm(D)
Color: Blue/Canvas.
